title: InWitched
description: Simple yet ✨ Whimsical | Experience 🪄 Witchcraft in Minecraft
body:
![Spacer Art](https://i.ibb.co/KxNxSmx/In-Witched-Spacer.png)

[![InWitched Art](https://i.ibb.co/8MhmMwN/In-Witched-Collage-Out-Line-VVmodel-NEW2.png)](https://sites.google.com/view/barryz/inwitched/home)

[![Twitter (aka X) @_barryz_](https://i.ibb.co/FKgqZsr/Twiiter-X.png)]([https://twitter.com/_barryz_](https://twitter.com/_barryz_))

![Spacer Art](https://i.ibb.co/KxNxSmx/In-Witched-Spacer.png)

![Overview](https://i.ibb.co/tYyJVXN/Overview-NEW.png)

InWitched is a simple magic mod that connects Minecraft & Witchcraft!
Experience thrill ranging from🧹Brooms to Shrooms🍄
 ☽ ⸙ ☾
 Full Release Date: 🪄 June 21st

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7kLWR8ofGhM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; class="center"; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Spacer Art](https://i.ibb.co/KxNxSmx/In-Witched-Spacer.png)
![Mod Elements](https://i.ibb.co/Fs9Z5Wh/Elements-NEW.png)
 
Current Features:

 
- Mushrooms -


Oyster, Pine, Russula, Flat, Pyrophilous, and Puffball Mushroom


- Blocks -


Magic Book, & Witches Cauldron...


- Brooms -


Broom + Bagged Broom, Overgrown Broom + Overgrown Bagged Broom, and Starry Broom + Starry Bagged Broom


- Misc. -


Flight Essence


- Spells -


Dark, Light, Water, Fire, Ice, Thunder, Wind, and Earth Spell


- Wands -


Basic Dark, Light, Water, Fire, Ice, Thunder, Wind, and Earth Wands + Enhanced Dark, Light, Water, Fire, Ice, Thunder, Wind, and Earth Wands

 

- Witch Hats -

 

Witch Hat, Basic Witch, Rounded Witch Hat, Overgrown Witch Hat, Starry Witch Hat

 ![Gif that shows visual of the Overgrown Bagged Broom, Player wearing overgrown witches hat, magic book, and flat mushroom](https://i.ibb.co/kHrwzbS/Overgrown-Set.gif)

More features can be found on the [InWitched webpage](https://sites.google.com/view/barryz/inwitched/home) along with recipes and much more!


![Spacer Art](https://i.ibb.co/KxNxSmx/In-Witched-Spacer.png)

![InWitched Download Goals: 1k- Icon Update 5k- Broom Speed Enchantment 10k- Bat Wings (Glider) 25k- New Style (Like the overgrown style)  Once goals are reached on either CurseForge or Modrinth I will work to implement the incentive!](https://i.ibb.co/Vqj5c2Z/Custom-dimensions-2160x5787-px-5.png)

![Spacer Art](https://i.ibb.co/KxNxSmx/In-Witched-Spacer.png)


Follow my [Twitter/X](https://twitter.com/_barryz_) for News and Updates on InWitched!

 

The mod may be used in mod packs & can be reviewed by anyone if credits are given and please do not reupload the mod anywhere {Unless otherwise stated}

I'm unsure if this mod is correctly marked for supported environments let me know if you notice anything wrong, thank you! <3

![Spacer Art](https://i.ibb.co/KxNxSmx/In-Witched-Spacer.png)
